prompt: Is there a relationship between course credits and average grade?

inputData.question: Is there a relationship between course credits and average grade?

input.question: Is there a relationship between course credits and average grade?

payload.question: Is there a relationship between course credits and average grade?

output.sql: SELECT c.credits AS credits, AVG(e.grade) AS avg_grade, COUNT(*) AS enrollment_count, STDDEV_POP(e.grade) AS grade_stddev FROM courses c JOIN enrollments e ON c.id = e.course_id GROUP BY c.credits ORDER BY c.credits;

visualization.description: Scatter of average grade by course credits with a fitted linear trend
visualization.title: Average Grade by Course Credits (with linear trend)

payload.sql: SELECT c.credits AS credits, AVG(e.grade) AS avg_grade, COUNT(*) AS enrollment_count, STDDEV_POP(e.grade) AS grade_stddev FROM courses c JOIN enrollments e ON c.id = e.course_id GROUP BY c.credits ORDER BY c.credits;
